text: This Conditional Waiver and Release of Lien Upon Final Payment is expressly conditioned upon receipt of payment and posting of same with Subcontractor's financial institution in the amount of $ Total Amount by Subcontractor from GS Construction Mountain, LLC This Conditional Waiver and Release of Lien Upon Final Payment acknowledges the complete satisfaction of, and forever waives and releases, all claims of every kind that Subcontractor has or may have in connection with Contractor, the Project and the Property and which could be asserted against the Project, the Property, Contractor, Owner, any lender on the Project and all officers, shareholders, members, managers, directors, agents and employees of any of them. Contractor is specifically relying on the foregoing in its dealings with Owner.
